name: Blossom Fields
description: The fairy domain of Princess Andromethia, characterized by rolling farmland, hills, and meadows that instill a feeling close to ecstasy in visitors. Its inhabitants are half-elf and half-satyr.
notes: Lucien was transported here in Session 3 and remained for five days, unable or unwilling to leave.
Princess Andromethia also holds lands in the mortal realm, somewhere in the south of Dolmenwood.
